title: cryptantha rugulosa
intro: Cryptantha rugulosa, also known as Needle Spine Cryptantha, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Cryptantha rugulosa include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
